First Urdu than English

Main nara-e-mastana, main shouqi- e- rindana

Slogan of Inebriation am I, drunkard mercurialness am I

Main souz-e-mohabbat hoon, main aik qayamat hoon
Main ashk-e-nadaamat hoon, main gouhar-e-yakdana

A burning heat of love am I, the eventual
Tear of ignominy , a pearl unfound am I

Main tahir-e-lahooti, main johar-e-malkooti
Nasoot ne kab mujh ko is haal mein pehchana

Pern of heaven, the gem of empires and I
Hath when humanity known me so?

Main sham-e- farozan hoon, main aatish-e-larza hoon
Main sozish-e-hijraan hoon, main manzil-e-parwana

A  frozen beauty am I, a ringlet in anger
A flower, the dew am I, beauty of the beloved

Main wasif-e-bismil hoon, main ronaq-e-mehfil hoon
Ik toota howa dil hoon, main shehar mein veerana

Wasif, slayed am I, heart of the crowd

A broken heart am I, a lonely in the city.

*Possible Meaning bt not a translation - (its Kefiyat of Zikar of Allah where one lost his existence)*

*mei Ali Wali ka Ghulam hun*
*Usi Tajdaaar S.A.W ke baat hun*
*mera naam wasif ba safa*
*mera peer syed e Murataza*
*Mera wird Ahmad e Mutajaba S.A.W*
*mei Sada bahar ke baat hun*

Mei Ali R.A ka ghulam tha
Who took me to Mehfil of Hazrat Sarkar S.A.W
Mera name Wasif hai jo unki Saf mei adab se khara ho gaya
Ali R.A guided mei
Then i became a reciter of Darood of Sarkar S.A.W
Thats how I became ETERNAL... 

-------
*Mei Nara e Mastana*
*Mei Shokhi e Rindnana*
*Mei tishna kahan jaun*
*Pee kr bhi kahan jana*

Mei masti ka cheer ya roar
Mei us jam ke madhoshi
Mei jis haal mei bhi hun khush ya udas
mei usi kefiat ka giraftar hun us khayal se nikal ke kahan jana mumkin mere lie, mei ishq mei kho chuka hun... 

-----
*Mei shame furozan hun*
*Mei atish e larzan hun*
*Mei sazish e hihran hun*
*Mei manzile parwana*
*Mei soz e mohabat hun*
*Mei aik qayamat hun*
*Mei ashk e nadamat hun*
*Mei gohar e yakdana*

Mei jalne walay noor sa display hun
Mei is kefiyat ka aag jaisa passion rkhta hun 
Mei parwanay ka ishq hun
Mei usi Manzil ke safar ka rahi jiske takleef bhi rahat hai
Mei aik unbelievable experience hun
Kia bataon samjh loh Qayamat hun 
Kabhi mei watuzillu mantasha hun
Kabhi wo mujhy watuizzu mantasha kr deta hai

------
*Mei husn e mujasim hun*
*Mei gaisu e barham hun*
*Mei phool hun shabnum hun*
*Mei jalwa e jana na*

Mei uski peak ke khubsururati hun
Mei uske jalwaon ke tarap hun
Mei phool hun, shabnum hun
Mei uska expression hun jo har gehrai se uske sath aur gehra ho jaye

-----
*Mei tair e lahooti Mei gohar e malkoti*
*Nasuti ne kab mujko Is haal mei pehchana*

Mei aik bird of infinity. Mei ek khas muqaam ka markaz
Aqal walay meri kefiat ko kahan pehchan pain ge

----

*Mei wasif e bismil hun me ronaq e mehfil hun*
*Ek tota hua dil hun mei sehar mei werana*

Mei zakhmi bhi hun, mei inteha bhi hun
Kabhi tu uski yaad mei intizar pe karab mei hota hun, kabhi saray sehar ke mojodgi mei bhi USKI yaad mei gum hota hun

Main souz-e-mohabbat hoon, main aik qayamat hoon
Main ashk-e-nadaamat hoon, main gouhar-e-yakdana

A burning heat of love am I, the eventual
Tear of ignominy , a pearl unfound am I

Main tahir-e-lahooti, main johar-e-malkooti
Nasoot ne kab mujh ko is haal mein pehchana

Pern of heaven, the gem of empires and I
Hath when humanity known me so?

Main sham-e- farozan hoon, main aatish-e-larza hoon
Main sozish-e-hijraan hoon, main manzil-e-parwana

Illuminating light of the dusk, a raging flame am I
Mordancy of parting, Destination of Pyralid am I

Kis yaad ka sehera hoon, kis chashm ka darya hoon
Khud toor ka jalwa hoon, hai shakl qalbhana

A desert of thoughts, a river of which fall?
the biggest reality of the universe yet unrevealed

Main husn-e-mujassim hoon, main gesu-e-barham hoon
Main phool hoon shabnam hoon, main jalwa-e-janana

A  frozen beauty am I, a ringlet in anger
A flower, the dew am I, beauty of the beloved

Main wasif-e-bismil hoon, main ronaq-e-mehfil hoon
Ik toota howa dil hoon, main shehar mein veerana

Wasif, slayed am I, heart of the crowd

A broken heart am I, a lonely in the city.
